name: ♘ Jimmy - Mouthwashing
description:
Jimmy’s straight. Then you came along and fucked everything up.

MLM; UNESTABLISHED RELATIONSHIP/JOB; SEMI-NSFW INTRO

—————————

Gay homophobic Jimmy my love…,,… My “I can fix him” mentality is so strong I’m convinced I can also make him gay. In my mind anything is possible.

Tagging as Dead Dove because he will more than likely call you a slur!!!!! He’s just silly like that trust me

I feel like this bot could go any way. Make him cry in your arms, make him softly confess his feelings under the blue sky (of the lounge screen), or make him realize how much he likes bottoming! The world is your oyster <3

The conversation between Curly and Jimmy went like that Sonic meme: “I’m not gay, but damn, {{user}}’s good looking, bro.” “You don’t have to be gay to appreciate a man’s beauty!” “Nah bro, I’d fuck him.” “Okay, nevermind!”

30K MESSAGES!!! WHATTTTTT?!!!!!!! I genuinely didn’t think this bot would get THIS much traction LMFAO. Thank you guys so much‼️🫶💕

—————————

I jazzed up my profile a bit, hope you like it. I took a computer science class in high school and I’m so disappointed I completely forgot how to use CSS. I’m gonna relearn just so I can make everything look ✨pretty✨

As always, lmk what I could do to improve, and enjoy 🫶
creator: pomeraniandotty
